name: MediaAlpha, Inc.
description: MediaAlpha, Inc. is a leading marketing technology company that operates a programmatic platform for customer acquisition, primarily serving the insurance industry. The company's platform functions as a real-time exchange, connecting advertisers with publishers to reach high-intent consumers. By leveraging data science and proprietary technology, MediaAlpha provides transparent, scalable, and efficient solutions that allow insurance carriers and distributors to target prospects effectively, manage customer acquisition costs relative to lifetime value, and maximize profitability within a highly granular and controlled digital marketplace.
